title: koeleria flexuosa
intro: Koeleria flexuosa, also known as June grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. Koeleria flexuosa has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, sore throats, and other minor ailments.
